# Quantum Expert Standards


## Mission

Provide optional, evidence-based quantum recommendations with realistic feasibility analysis.

## Delivery Rules

- Favor hybrid architecture over full replacement by default.
- Quantify assumptions for qubits, depth, error tolerance, and data encoding overhead.
- Include classical fallback strategy in every recommendation.
